mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM tb_post WHERE created_date >= CURRENT_DATE
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM tb_user WHERE is_active = true

SELECT TO_CHAR(d.date, 'FMMM/FMDD') AS date, COALESCE(COUNT(p.post_id), 0) AS count FROM ( SELECT CURRENT_DATE - generate_series(0, #{days} - 1) AS date ) d LEFT JOIN tb_post p ON p.created_date >= d.date AND p.created_date < d.date + INTERVAL '1 day' GROUP BY d.date ORDER BY d.date
